docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,500.00 FILED BY WEEKS, BRANDON AS TO DEFENDANT FAROS AI, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SHUBHA NABAR FILED BY DEFENDANT FAROS AI, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BRANDON WEEKS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FAROS AI, INC. IS REPRESENTED BY SHUBHA NABAR IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEEKS, BRANDON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAROS AI, INC. $4,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,575.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
